title: Bulk Bag Sugared Almonds
features: Whilst every effort has been taken to ensure the accuracy of the product information provided, products and their Ingredients may change. You are advised to always read the product label for Ingredients, nutrition, dietary claims and allergens.

Store in a cool dry place away from sunlight, Packed in a factory which handles nuts. Choking hazard not suitable for children under the age of 3.
Distributed in the UK by Manchester Confectionery, Unit H Prestwich Ind Est, Atherton, M46 0FY
description: Product description These sweets are made by quality confectioners Glisten, this is a 3kg bulk bag of assorted sugared almonds which come in lovely pastel colours pink, white, lemon and lilac.
